Property.name: modulationDestinationsPrefixDisplayNames
Property.value: A:OP4 =[A Op4] ;A:OP3 =[A Op3] ;A:OP2 =[A Op2] ;A:OP1 =[A Op1] ;A:Pch =[A Patch] ;B:OP4 =[B Op4] ;B:OP3 =[B Op3] ;B:OP2 =[B Op2] ;B:OP1 =[B Op1] ;B:Pch =[B Patch] ;LFO =[LFO] ;CH3 =[Channel 3] ;CH3 OP1 =[Channel 3 OP1] ;CH3 OP2 =[Channel 3 OP2] ;CH3 OP3 =[Channel 3 OP3] ;CH3 OP4 =[Channel 3 OP4] ;Voice =[Voice] ;L01 =[FM 1] ;L02 =[FM 2] ;L03 =[FM 3] ;L04 =[FM 4] ;L05 =[FM 5] ;L06 =[FM 6] ;L07 =[Square 1] ;L08 =[Square 2] ;L09 =[Square 3] ;L10 =[Noise] ;Step0 =[Step 1] ;Step1 =[Step 2] ;Step2 =[Step 3] ;Step3 =[Step 4] ;Step4 =[Step 5] ;Step5 =[Step 6] ;Step6 =[Step 7] ;Step7 =[Step 8] ;Step8 =[Step 9] ;Step9 =[Step 10] ;Step10 =[Step 11] ;Step11 =[Step 12] ;Step12 =[Step 13] ;Step13 =[Step 14] ;Step14 =[Step 15] ;DAC =[DAC]

Style.name: STEPEDITAliases
Style.aliases: A:OP4 Level;A:OP4 Feedback;A:OP4 Mult;A:OP4 Detune;A:OP4 A;A:OP4 D;A:OP4 S;A:OP4 D2;A:OP4 R;A:OP4 TremOn;A:OP4 SSG Env;A:OP3 Level;A:OP3 Mult;A:OP3 Detune;A:OP3 A;A:OP3 D;A:OP3 S;A:OP3 D2;A:OP3 R;A:OP3 TremOn;A:OP3 SSG Env;A:OP2 Level;A:OP2 Mult;A:OP2 Detune;A:OP2 A;A:OP2 D;A:OP2 S;A:OP2 D2;A:OP2 R;A:OP2 TremOn;A:OP2 SSG Env;A:OP1 Level;A:OP1 Mult;A:OP1 Detune;A:OP1 A;A:OP1 D;A:OP1 S;A:OP1 D2;A:OP1 R;A:OP1 TremOn;A:OP1 SSG Env;A:Pch Algorithm;A:Pch Vibrato;A:Pch Tremolo;B:OP4 Level;B:OP4 Feedback;B:OP4 Mult;B:OP4 Detune;B:OP4 A;B:OP4 D;B:OP4 S;B:OP4 D2;B:OP4 R;B:OP4 TremOn;B:OP4 SSG Env;B:OP3 Level;B:OP3 Mult;B:OP3 Detune;B:OP3 A;B:OP3 D;B:OP3 S;B:OP3 D2;B:OP3 R;B:OP3 TremOn;B:OP3 SSG Env;B:OP2 Level;B:OP2 Mult;B:OP2 Detune;B:OP2 A;B:OP2 D;B:OP2 S;B:OP2 D2;B:OP2 R;B:OP2 TremOn;B:OP2 SSG Env;B:OP1 Level;B:OP1 Mult;B:OP1 Detune;B:OP1 A;B:OP1 D;B:OP1 S;B:OP1 D2;B:OP1 R;B:OP1 TremOn;B:OP1 SSG Env;B:Pch Algorithm;B:Pch Vibrato;B:Pch Tremolo;LFO Rate;Ch3 Mode;CH3 OP4 Coarse;CH3 OP3 Coarse;CH3 OP2 Coarse;CH3 OP1 Coarse;CH3 OP4 Fine;CH3 OP3 Fine;CH3 OP2 Fine;CH3 OP1 Fine;L01 Instrument;L01 Pan;L01 Transpose;L01 Detune;L01 Amp (steps);L02 Instrument;L02 Pan;L02 Transpose;L02 Detune;L02 Amp (steps);L03 Instrument;L03 Pan;L03 Transpose;L03 Detune;L03 Amp (steps);L04 Instrument;L04 Pan;L04 Transpose;L04 Detune;L04 Amp (steps);L05 Instrument;L05 Pan;L05 Transpose;L05 Detune;L05 Amp (steps);L06 Instrument;L06 Pan;L06 Transpose;L06 Detune;L06 Amp (steps);L07 Transpose;L07 Detune;L07 Amp (steps);L08 Transpose;L08 Detune;L08 Amp (steps);L09 Transpose;L09 Detune;L09 Amp (steps);L10 Amp (steps);L10 Noise Type;L10 Noise Freq;Voice Detune;Voice Transpose;Voice Amplitude;DAC Resolution
